abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）的泛化性能受到训练图像的数量、质量和种类的影响。训练图像必须被注释，这是耗时且昂贵的。我们工作的目标是减少训练 CNN 所需的带注释图像的数量，同时保持其性能。我们假设，通过确保训练图像集包含大部分难以分类的图像，可以更快地提高 CNN 的性能。我们研究的目的是通过主动学习方法来测试这一假设，该方法可以自动选择难以分类的图像。我们开发了一种基于 Mask Region 的 CNN（Mask R-CNN）的主动学习方法，并将该方法命名为 MaskAL。 MaskAL 涉及 Mask R-CNN 的迭代训练，之后使用训练后的模型选择一组模型最不确定的未标记图像。然后对所选图像进行注释并用于重新训练 Mask R-CNN，并重复多次采样迭代。在我们的研究中，MaskAL 与西兰花数据集上具有五个视觉相似类别的随机采样方法进行了比较。 MaskAL 的表现明显优于随机采样。此外，MaskAL 在采样 900 张图像后的性能与随机采样在 2300 张图像后的性能相同。与在整个训练集（14,000 张图像）上训练的 Mask R-CNN 模型相比，MaskAL 用 17.9% 的训练数据实现了该模型 93.9% 的性能。随机抽样使用 16.4% 的训练数据实现了该模型 81.9% 的性能。我们的结论是，通过使用 MaskAL，可以减少在具有视觉相似类别的西兰花数据集上训练 Mask R-CNN 的注释工作。我们的软件可在 https://github.com/pieterblok/maskal 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MaskAL的主动学习方法，旨在减少训练Mask R-CNN所需的标注图像数量，同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 图像标注过程耗时且昂贵，尤其在具有视觉相似类别的数据集中。传统方法依赖随机采样，效率低下，因此需要更有效的主动学习策略来优化标注资源。
AI.method: 开发了MaskAL方法，通过迭代训练Mask R-CNN模型，利用模型对未标注图像的不确定性进行排序，选择最难以分类的图像进行标注，并重复此过程以逐步优化模型。
AI.result: 在包含五个视觉相似类别的西兰花数据集上，MaskAL在仅使用17.9%训练数据时达到全数据集模型性能的93.9%，而随机采样仅达到81.9%。MaskAL在900张标注图像上的表现等同于随机采样2300张图像的效果。
AI.conclusion: MaskAL能有效减少训练Mask R-CNN的标注工作量，尤其适用于类别间差异较小的数据集，相关工具已开源。

authors_text: Samuel Teuber,Marko Kleine Büning,Philipp Kern,Carsten Sinz
title: Geometric Path Enumeration for Equivalence Verification of Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于神经网络等价性验证的几何路径枚举
comment: Paper presented at The 33rd IEEE International Conference on Tools with Artificial Intelligence (ICTAI)
comments: Paper presented at The 33rd IEEE International Conference on Tools with Artificial Intelligence (ICTAI)
abstract: As neural networks (NNs) are increasingly introduced into safety-critical domains, there is a growing need to formally verify NNs before deployment. In this work we focus on the formal verification problem of NN equivalence which aims to prove that two NNs (e.g. an original and a compressed version) show equivalent behavior. Two approaches have been proposed for this problem: Mixed integer linear programming and interval propagation. While the first approach lacks scalability, the latter is only suitable for structurally similar NNs with small weight changes. The contribution of our paper has four parts. First, we show a theoretical result by proving that the epsilon-equivalence problem is coNP-complete. Secondly, we extend Tran et al.'s single NN geometric path enumeration algorithm to a setting with multiple NNs. In a third step, we implement the extended algorithm for equivalence verification and evaluate optimizations necessary for its practical use. Finally, we perform a comparative evaluation showing use-cases where our approach outperforms the previous state of the art, both, for equivalence verification as well as for counter-example finding.
summary: As neural networks (NNs) are increasingly introduced into safety-critical domains, there is a growing need to formally verify NNs before deployment. In this work we focus on the formal verification problem of NN equivalence which aims to prove that two NNs (e.g. an original and a compressed version) show equivalent behavior. Two approaches have been proposed for this problem: Mixed integer linear programming and interval propagation. While the first approach lacks scalability, the latter is only suitable for structurally similar NNs with small weight changes. The contribution of our paper has four parts. First, we show a theoretical result by proving that the epsilon-equivalence problem is coNP-complete. Secondly, we extend Tran et al.'s single NN geometric path enumeration algorithm to a setting with multiple NNs. In a third step, we implement the extended algorithm for equivalence verification and evaluate optimizations necessary for its practical use. Finally, we perform a comparative evaluation showing use-cases where our approach outperforms the previous state of the art, both, for equivalence verification as well as for counter-example finding.
abstract_zh: 随着神经网络 (NN) 越来越多地被引入安全关键领域，越来越需要在部署前正式验证 NN。在这项工作中，我们重点关注神经网络等效性的形式验证问题，旨在证明两个神经网络（例如原始版本和压缩版本）表现出等效的行为。针对这个问题提出了两种方法：混合整数线性规划和区间传播。虽然第一种方法缺乏可扩展性，但后者仅适用于结构相似且权重变化较小的神经网络。我们论文的贡献有四个部分。首先，我们通过证明 epsilon 等价问题是 coNP 完全问题来展示理论结果。其次，我们将 Tran 等人的单 NN 几何路径枚举算法扩展到具有多个 NN 的设置。第三步，我们实现用于等效性验证的扩展算法并评估其实际使用所需的优化。最后，我们进行了比较评估，显示了我们的方法在等价性验证和反例发现方面均优于先前技术水平的用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何路径枚举的神经网络等价性验证方法，解决神经网络压缩等场景下的行为一致性验证问题。
AI.motivation: 随着神经网络在安全关键领域应用增加，需在部署前进行形式化验证。现有方法存在可扩展性差或结构限制等问题，亟需更高效的等价性验证方案。
AI.method: 理论证明ε-等价性问题属于coNP完全，扩展单网络几何路径枚举算法至多网络场景，并实现优化后的验证算法进行实验评估。
AI.result: 新方法在等价性验证和反例搜索方面均优于现有技术，尤其在处理结构差异较大或权重变化显著的网络时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与算法改进，本文提出了一种更高效且适用性更强的神经网络等价性验证框架，为安全关键场景的网络验证提供了新思路。

method: 理论证明ε-等价性问题属于coNP完全，扩展单网络几何路径枚举算法至多网络场景，并实现优化后的验证算法进行实验评估。
result: 新方法在等价性验证和反例搜索方面均优于现有技术，尤其在处理结构差异较大或权重变化显著的网络时表现更优。
conclusion: 通过理论分析与算法改进，本文提出了一种更高效且适用性更强的神经网络等价性验证框架，为安全关键场景的网络验证提供了新思路。
search_text: Geometric Path Enumeration for Equivalence Verification of Neural Networks 用于神经网络等价性验证的几何路径枚举 As neural networks (NNs) are increasingly introduced into safety-critical domains, there is a growing need to formally verify NNs before deployment. In this work we focus on the formal verification problem of NN equivalence which aims to prove that two NNs (e.g. an original and a compressed version) show equivalent behavior. Two approaches have been proposed for this problem: Mixed integer linear programming and interval propagation. While the first approach lacks scalability, the latter is only suitable for structurally similar NNs with small weight changes. The contribution of our paper has four parts. First, we show a theoretical result by proving that the epsilon-equivalence problem is coNP-complete. Secondly, we extend Tran et al.'s single NN geometric path enumeration algorithm to a setting with multiple NNs. In a third step, we implement the extended algorithm for equivalence verification and evaluate optimizations necessary for its practical use. Finally, we perform a comparative evaluation showing use-cases where our approach outperforms the previous state of the art, both, for equivalence verification as well as for counter-example finding. 随着神经网络 (NN) 越来越多地被引入安全关键领域，越来越需要在部署前正式验证 NN。在这项工作中，我们重点关注神经网络等效性的形式验证问题，旨在证明两个神经网络（例如原始版本和压缩版本）表现出等效的行为。针对这个问题提出了两种方法：混合整数线性规划和区间传播。虽然第一种方法缺乏可扩展性，但后者仅适用于结构相似且权重变化较小的神经网络。我们论文的贡献有四个部分。首先，我们通过证明 epsilon 等价问题是 coNP 完全问题来展示理论结果。其次，我们将 Tran 等人的单 NN 几何路径枚举算法扩展到具有多个 NN 的设置。第三步，我们实现用于等效性验证的扩展算法并评估其实际使用所需的优化。最后，我们进行了比较评估，显示了我们的方法在等价性验证和反例发现方面均优于先前技术水平的用例。 本文提出一种基于几何路径枚举的神经网络等价性验证方法，解决神经网络压缩等场景下的行为一致性验证问题。 Samuel Teuber,Marko Kleine Büning,Philipp Kern,Carsten Sinz cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CC,cs.LO

authors_text: Sayan Bandyapadhyay,Fedor V. Fomin,Petr A. Golovach,William Lochet,Nidhi Purohit,Kirill Simonov
title: How to Find a Good Explanation for Clustering?
title_zh: 如何找到聚类的良好解释？
abstract: $k$-means and $k$-median clustering are powerful unsupervised machine learning techniques. However, due to complicated dependences on all the features, it is challenging to interpret the resulting cluster assignments. Moshkovitz, Dasgupta, Rashtchian, and Frost [ICML 2020] proposed an elegant model of explainable $k$-means and $k$-median clustering. In this model, a decision tree with $k$ leaves provides a straightforward characterization of the data set into clusters. We study two natural algorithmic questions about explainable clustering. (1) For a given clustering, how to find the "best explanation" by using a decision tree with $k$ leaves? (2) For a given set of points, how to find a decision tree with $k$ leaves minimizing the $k$-means/median objective of the resulting explainable clustering? To address the first question, we introduce a new model of explainable clustering. Our model, inspired by the notion of outliers in robust statistics, is the following. We are seeking a small number of points (outliers) whose removal makes the existing clustering well-explainable. For addressing the second question, we initiate the study of the model of Moshkovitz et al. from the perspective of multivariate complexity. Our rigorous algorithmic analysis sheds some light on the influence of parameters like the input size, dimension of the data, the number of outliers, the number of clusters, and the approximation ratio, on the computational complexity of explainable clustering.
summary: $k$-means and $k$-median clustering are powerful unsupervised machine learning techniques. However, due to complicated dependences on all the features, it is challenging to interpret the resulting cluster assignments. Moshkovitz, Dasgupta, Rashtchian, and Frost [ICML 2020] proposed an elegant model of explainable $k$-means and $k$-median clustering. In this model, a decision tree with $k$ leaves provides a straightforward characterization of the data set into clusters. We study two natural algorithmic questions about explainable clustering. (1) For a given clustering, how to find the "best explanation" by using a decision tree with $k$ leaves? (2) For a given set of points, how to find a decision tree with $k$ leaves minimizing the $k$-means/median objective of the resulting explainable clustering? To address the first question, we introduce a new model of explainable clustering. Our model, inspired by the notion of outliers in robust statistics, is the following. We are seeking a small number of points (outliers) whose removal makes the existing clustering well-explainable. For addressing the second question, we initiate the study of the model of Moshkovitz et al. from the perspective of multivariate complexity. Our rigorous algorithmic analysis sheds some light on the influence of parameters like the input size, dimension of the data, the number of outliers, the number of clusters, and the approximation ratio, on the computational complexity of explainable clustering.
abstract_zh: $k$-means 和 $k$-median 聚类是强大的无监督机器学习技术。然而，由于对所有特征的复杂依赖性，解释所产生的聚类分配具有挑战性。 Moshkovitz、Dasgupta、Rashtchian 和 Frost [ICML 2020] 提出了一种可解释的 $k$ 均值和 $k$ 中值聚类的优雅模型。在此模型中，具有 $k$ 个叶子的决策树提供了将数据集直接表征为聚类的方法。我们研究两个关于可解释聚类的自然算法问题。 (1) 对于给定的聚类，如何使用具有$k$个叶子的决策树找到“最佳解释”？ (2) 对于给定的点集，如何找到具有 $k$ 叶子的决策树，最小化所得可解释聚类的 $k$ 均值/中值目标？为了解决第一个问题，我们引入了一种新的可解释聚类模型。我们的模型受到稳健统计中异常值概念的启发，如下所示。我们正在寻找少量的点（异常值），这些点的删除使得现有的聚类可以很好地解释。为了解决第二个问题，我们启动了Moshkovitz等人的模型的研究。从多元复杂性的角度来看。我们严格的算法分析揭示了输入大小、数据维度、离群值数量、聚类数量和近似率等参数对可解释聚类计算复杂性的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过决策树为聚类结果提供可解释性，并探讨相关算法问题。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法（如k-means/k-median）的聚类结果难以解释，需寻找更直观的解释方式以增强可理解性。
AI.method: 引入包含异常值的新模型，通过决策树解释现有聚类；从多变量复杂度角度分析算法参数对计算复杂度的影响。
AI.result: 提出寻找最佳解释的算法框架，分析输入规模、维度、聚类数等参数对可解释聚类计算复杂度的影响。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析明确了参数对可解释聚类问题的影响，为后续算法设计提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Dylan Solms
title: Solving the non-preemptive two queue polling model with generally distributed service and switch-over durations and Poisson arrivals as a Semi-Markov Decision Process
title_zh: 作为半马尔可夫决策过程求解具有一般分布式服务和切换持续时间以及泊松到达的非抢占式二队列轮询模型
abstract: The polling system with switch-over durations is a useful model with several practical applications. It is classified as a Discrete Event Dynamic System (DEDS) for which no one agreed upon modelling approach exists. Furthermore, DEDS are quite complex. To date, the most sophisticated approach to modelling the polling system of interest has been a Continuous-time Markov Decision Process (CTMDP). This paper presents a Semi-Markov Decision Process (SMDP) formulation of the polling system as to introduce additional modelling power. Such power comes at the expense of truncation errors and expensive numerical integrals which naturally leads to the question of whether the SMDP policy provides a worthwhile advantage. To further add to this scenario, it is shown how sparsity can be exploited in the CTMDP to develop a computationally efficient model. The discounted performance of the SMDP and CTMDP policies are evaluated using a Semi-Markov Process simulator. The two policies are accompanied by a heuristic policy specifically developed for this polling system a well as an exhaustive service policy. Parametric and non-parametric hypothesis tests are used to test whether differences in performance are statistically significant.
summary: The polling system with switch-over durations is a useful model with several practical applications. It is classified as a Discrete Event Dynamic System (DEDS) for which no one agreed upon modelling approach exists. Furthermore, DEDS are quite complex. To date, the most sophisticated approach to modelling the polling system of interest has been a Continuous-time Markov Decision Process (CTMDP). This paper presents a Semi-Markov Decision Process (SMDP) formulation of the polling system as to introduce additional modelling power. Such power comes at the expense of truncation errors and expensive numerical integrals which naturally leads to the question of whether the SMDP policy provides a worthwhile advantage. To further add to this scenario, it is shown how sparsity can be exploited in the CTMDP to develop a computationally efficient model. The discounted performance of the SMDP and CTMDP policies are evaluated using a Semi-Markov Process simulator. The two policies are accompanied by a heuristic policy specifically developed for this polling system a well as an exhaustive service policy. Parametric and non-parametric hypothesis tests are used to test whether differences in performance are statistically significant.
abstract_zh: 具有切换持续时间的轮询系统是一个有用的模型，具有多种实际应用。它被归类为离散事件动态系统（DEDS），目前尚未达成一致的建模方法。此外，DEDS 相当复杂。迄今为止，对感兴趣的轮询系统进行建模的最复杂的方法是连续时间马尔可夫决策过程（CTMDP）。本文提出了轮询系统的半马尔可夫决策过程（SMDP）公式，以引入额外的建模能力。这种能力是以截断误差和昂贵的数值积分为代价的，这自然会引发一个问题：SMDP 政策是否提供了有价值的优势。为了进一步丰富这一场景，本文展示了如何在 CTMDP 中利用稀疏性来开发计算高效的模型。 SMDP 和 CTMDP 策略的折扣性能使用半马尔可夫过程模拟器进行评估。这两项政策都伴随着专门为该投票系统开发的启发式政策以及详尽的服务政策。参数和非参数假设检验用于测试性能差异是否具有统计显着性。

AI.tldr: 本文将非抢占式双队列轮询模型建模为半马尔可夫决策过程（SMDP），并比较其与连续时间马尔可夫决策过程（CTMDP）及其他策略的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 轮询系统作为离散事件动态系统（DEDS）存在建模复杂性，现有CTMDP方法受限于截断误差和计算成本，需探索更高效的建模方式并验证其优势。
AI.method: 提出SMDP建模方法，结合稀疏性优化CTMDP计算效率，通过半马尔可夫模拟器评估策略性能，并采用统计检验对比不同策略的折扣性能。
AI.result: SMDP与CTMDP策略的性能差异通过统计检验验证显著性，同时稀疏性优化提升了CTMDP的计算效率，但SMDP的建模优势需权衡其计算代价。
AI.conclusion: SMDP在建模灵活性上优于CTMDP，但其高计算成本需根据实际场景权衡；稀疏性优化为CTMDP提供了高效实现路径，但未完全取代SMDP的适用性。

The discounted performance of the SMDP and CTMDP policies are evaluated using a Semi-Markov Process simulator. The two policies are accompanied by a heuristic policy specifically developed for this polling system a well as an exhaustive service policy. Parametric and non-parametric hypothesis tests are used to test whether differences in performance are statistically significant. 具有切换持续时间的轮询系统是一个有用的模型，具有多种实际应用。它被归类为离散事件动态系统（DEDS），目前尚未达成一致的建模方法。此外，DEDS 相当复杂。迄今为止，对感兴趣的轮询系统进行建模的最复杂的方法是连续时间马尔可夫决策过程（CTMDP）。本文提出了轮询系统的半马尔可夫决策过程（SMDP）公式，以引入额外的建模能力。这种能力是以截断误差和昂贵的数值积分为代价的，这自然会引发一个问题：SMDP 政策是否提供了有价值的优势。为了进一步丰富这一场景，本文展示了如何在 CTMDP 中利用稀疏性来开发计算高效的模型。 SMDP 和 CTMDP 策略的折扣性能使用半马尔可夫过程模拟器进行评估。这两项政策都伴随着专门为该投票系统开发的启发式政策以及详尽的服务政策。参数和非参数假设检验用于测试性能差异是否具有统计显着性。 本文将非抢占式双队列轮询模型建模为半马尔可夫决策过程（SMDP），并比较其与连续时间马尔可夫决策过程（CTMDP）及其他策略的性能差异。 Dylan Solms math.OC,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaosen Wang,Zeliang Zhang,Kangheng Tong,Dihong Gong,Kun He,Zhifeng Li,Wei Liu
title: Triangle Attack: A Query-efficient Decision-based Adversarial Attack
title_zh: 三角攻击：一种高效查询的基于决策的对抗攻击
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022, code is available at https://github.com/xiaosen-wang/TA
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022, code is available at https://github.com/xiaosen-wang/TA
abstract: Decision-based attack poses a severe threat to real-world applications since it regards the target model as a black box and only accesses the hard prediction label. Great efforts have been made recently to decrease the number of queries; however, existing decision-based attacks still require thousands of queries in order to generate good quality adversarial examples. In this work, we find that a benign sample, the current and the next adversarial examples can naturally construct a triangle in a subspace for any iterative attacks. Based on the law of sines, we propose a novel Triangle Attack (TA) to optimize the perturbation by utilizing the geometric information that the longer side is always opposite the larger angle in any triangle. However, directly applying such information on the input image is ineffective because it cannot thoroughly explore the neighborhood of the input sample in the high dimensional space. To address this issue, TA optimizes the perturbation in the low frequency space for effective dimensionality reduction owing to the generality of such geometric property. Extensive evaluations on ImageNet dataset show that TA achieves a much higher attack success rate within 1,000 queries and needs a much less number of queries to achieve the same attack success rate under various perturbation budgets than existing decision-based attacks. With such high efficiency, we further validate the applicability of TA on real-world API, i.e., Tencent Cloud API.
summary: Decision-based attack poses a severe threat to real-world applications since it regards the target model as a black box and only accesses the hard prediction label. Great efforts have been made recently to decrease the number of queries; however, existing decision-based attacks still require thousands of queries in order to generate good quality adversarial examples. In this work, we find that a benign sample, the current and the next adversarial examples can naturally construct a triangle in a subspace for any iterative attacks. Based on the law of sines, we propose a novel Triangle Attack (TA) to optimize the perturbation by utilizing the geometric information that the longer side is always opposite the larger angle in any triangle. However, directly applying such information on the input image is ineffective because it cannot thoroughly explore the neighborhood of the input sample in the high dimensional space. To address this issue, TA optimizes the perturbation in the low frequency space for effective dimensionality reduction owing to the generality of such geometric property. Extensive evaluations on ImageNet dataset show that TA achieves a much higher attack success rate within 1,000 queries and needs a much less number of queries to achieve the same attack success rate under various perturbation budgets than existing decision-based attacks. With such high efficiency, we further validate the applicability of TA on real-world API, i.e., Tencent Cloud API.
abstract_zh: 基于决策的攻击对现实世界的应用程序构成了严重威胁，因为它将目标模型视为黑匣子并且仅访问硬预测标签。最近为减少查询数量做出了很大的努力；然而，现有的基于决策的攻击仍然需要数千个查询才能生成高质量的对抗性示例。在这项工作中，我们发现良性样本、当前和下一个对抗样本可以自然地在子空间中构造一个三角形，以进行任何迭代攻击。基于正弦定律，我们提出了一种新颖的三角形攻击（TA），利用任何三角形中长边总是与较大角度相对的几何信息来优化扰动。然而，直接将这些信息应用于输入图像是无效的，因为它无法彻底探索高维空间中输入样本的邻域。为了解决这个问题，由于这种几何性质的通用性，TA优化了低频空间中的扰动以有效降维。对 ImageNet 数据集的广泛评估表明，与现有的基于决策的攻击相比，TA 在 1,000 个查询内实现了更高的攻击成功率，并且在各种扰动预算下需要更少的查询数量来实现相同的攻击成功率。如此高的效率，我们进一步验证了TA在现实API（即腾讯云API）上的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Triangle Attack的高效决策型对抗攻击方法，用于在黑盒模型中生成高质量的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有的决策型对抗攻击方法需要大量的查询次数才能生成高质量的对抗样本，这限制了其在实际应用中的效率。
AI.method: 基于三角形几何特性，利用正弦定律优化扰动，通过在低频空间中进行扰动优化以实现有效的降维。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，TA在1000次查询内实现了更高的攻击成功率，并且在不同扰动预算下所需查询次数更少。此外，TA在腾讯云API上也验证了其实际应用性。
AI.conclusion: Triangle Attack是一种高效的决策型对抗攻击方法，可以在更少的查询次数内生成高质量的对抗样本，并在实际API中验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Stephen Bonner,Ufuk Kirik,Ola Engkvist,Jian Tang,Ian P Barrett
title: Implications of Topological Imbalance for Representation Learning on Biomedical Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 拓扑不平衡对生物医学知识图表示学习的影响
comment: Briefings in Bioinformatics, 2022
comments: Briefings in Bioinformatics, 2022
abstract: Adoption of recently developed methods from machine learning has given rise to creation of drug-discovery knowledge graphs (KG) that utilize the interconnected nature of the domain. Graph-based modelling of the data, combined with KG embedding (KGE) methods, are promising as they provide a more intuitive representation and are suitable for inference tasks such as predicting missing links. One common application is to produce ranked lists of genes for a given disease, where the rank is based on the perceived likelihood of association between the gene and the disease. It is thus critical that these predictions are not only pertinent but also biologically meaningful. However, KGs can be biased either directly due to the underlying data sources that are integrated or due to modeling choices in the construction of the graph, one consequence of which is that certain entities can get topologically overrepresented. We demonstrate the effect of these inherent structural imbalances, resulting in densely-connected entities being highly ranked no matter the context. We provide support for this observation across different datasets, models as well as predictive tasks. Further, we present various graph perturbation experiments which yield more support to the observation that KGE models can be more influenced by the frequency of entities rather than any biological information encoded within the relations. Our results highlight the importance of data modeling choices, and emphasizes the need for practitioners to be mindful of these issues when interpreting model outputs and during KG composition.
summary: Adoption of recently developed methods from machine learning has given rise to creation of drug-discovery knowledge graphs (KG) that utilize the interconnected nature of the domain. Graph-based modelling of the data, combined with KG embedding (KGE) methods, are promising as they provide a more intuitive representation and are suitable for inference tasks such as predicting missing links. One common application is to produce ranked lists of genes for a given disease, where the rank is based on the perceived likelihood of association between the gene and the disease. It is thus critical that these predictions are not only pertinent but also biologically meaningful. However, KGs can be biased either directly due to the underlying data sources that are integrated or due to modeling choices in the construction of the graph, one consequence of which is that certain entities can get topologically overrepresented. We demonstrate the effect of these inherent structural imbalances, resulting in densely-connected entities being highly ranked no matter the context. We provide support for this observation across different datasets, models as well as predictive tasks. Further, we present various graph perturbation experiments which yield more support to the observation that KGE models can be more influenced by the frequency of entities rather than any biological information encoded within the relations. Our results highlight the importance of data modeling choices, and emphasizes the need for practitioners to be mindful of these issues when interpreting model outputs and during KG composition.
abstract_zh: 采用最近开发的机器学习方法已经产生了利用领域互连性质的药物发现知识图（KG）的创建。基于图的数据建模与知识图谱嵌入（KGE）方法相结合，前景广阔，因为它们提供了更直观的表示，并且适合预测缺失链接等推理任务。一种常见的应用是生成给定疾病的基因排名列表，其中排名基于基因与疾病之间关联的感知可能性。因此，至关重要的是，这些预测不仅具有相关性，而且具有生物学意义。然而，知识图谱可能会直接由于集成的底层数据源或由于图构建中的建模选择而产生偏差，其后果之一是某些实体可能在拓扑上被过度代表。我们证明了这些固有的结构不平衡的影响，导致紧密连接的实体无论在什么情况下都排名靠前。我们为跨不同数据集、模型以及预测任务的观察提供支持。此外，我们提出了各种图扰动实验，这些实验为以下观察提供了更多支持：KGE 模型更容易受到实体频率的影响，而不是关系中编码的任何生物信息的影响。我们的结果强调了数据建模选择的重要性，并强调从业者在解释模型输出和知识图谱构建时需要注意这些问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了生物医学知识图谱中拓扑结构不平衡对表示学习的影响，指出实体频率可能比生物信息更影响模型预测结果。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱可能因数据源或建模选择导致结构偏差，使某些实体被过度表示，从而影响预测的生物学意义。
AI.method: 通过不同数据集和模型的图扰动实验，分析实体频率与生物信息对知识图谱嵌入模型的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，密集连接的实体在不同任务中均被高排名，模型更依赖实体频率而非关系中的生物信息。
AI.conclusion: 需重视数据建模选择对模型输出的影响，在解读结果和构建知识图谱时应谨慎处理结构偏差问题。

authors_text: Giacomo Fumagalli,Davide Raimondi,Raffaele Giancarlo,Dario Malchiodi,Marco Frasca
title: On the Choice of General Purpose Classifiers in Learned Bloom Filters: An Initial Analysis Within Basic Filters
title_zh: 关于学习布隆过滤器中通用分类器的选择：基本过滤器内的初步分析
comment: ICPRAM 2022
comments: ICPRAM 2022
abstract: Bloom Filters are a fundamental and pervasive data structure. Within the growing area of Learned Data Structures, several Learned versions of Bloom Filters have been considered, yielding advantages over classic Filters. Each of them uses a classifier, which is the Learned part of the data structure. Although it has a central role in those new filters, and its space footprint as well as classification time may affect the performance of the Learned Filter, no systematic study of which specific classifier to use in which circumstances is available. We report progress in this area here, providing also initial guidelines on which classifier to choose among five classic classification paradigms.
summary: Bloom Filters are a fundamental and pervasive data structure. Within the growing area of Learned Data Structures, several Learned versions of Bloom Filters have been considered, yielding advantages over classic Filters. Each of them uses a classifier, which is the Learned part of the data structure. Although it has a central role in those new filters, and its space footprint as well as classification time may affect the performance of the Learned Filter, no systematic study of which specific classifier to use in which circumstances is available. We report progress in this area here, providing also initial guidelines on which classifier to choose among five classic classification paradigms.
abstract_zh: 布隆过滤器是一种基本且普遍的数据结构。在学习数据结构不断发展的领域中，已经考虑了布隆过滤器的多个学习版本，它们比经典过滤器具有优势。它们每个都使用一个分类器，这是数据结构的学习部分。尽管它在这些新过滤器中起着核心作用，并且其空间占用以及分类时间可能会影响学习过滤器的性能，但目前还没有系统研究在哪种情况下使用哪种特定分类器。我们在这里报告这一领域的进展，还提供了在五种经典分类范例中选择哪种分类器的初步指南。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在学习型布隆过滤器中选择通用分类器的问题，分析了五种经典分类范式在基础过滤器中的适用性。
AI.motivation: 学习型布隆过滤器的性能高度依赖分类器的选择，但目前缺乏系统性研究指导如何根据具体场景选择最优分类器。
AI.method: 通过实验对比五种经典分类方法在基础过滤器中的表现，分析其空间占用和分类时间对整体性能的影响。
AI.result: 发现不同分类器在不同场景下表现差异显著，初步提出基于空间和时间需求的分类器选择指南。
AI.conclusion: 分类器选择需结合具体应用需求，未来需进一步探索更复杂的分类范式与场景适配性。

authors_text: Wenqiao Zhang,Haochen Shi,Jiannan Guo,Shengyu Zhang,Qingpeng Cai,Juncheng Li,Sihui Luo,Yueting Zhuang
title: MAGIC: Multimodal relAtional Graph adversarIal inferenCe for Diverse and Unpaired Text-based Image Captioning
title_zh: MAGIC：用于多样化和不成对的基于文本的图像描述的多模态关系图对抗推理
comment: ef:AAAI 2022
comments: ef:AAAI 2022
abstract: Text-based image captioning (TextCap) requires simultaneous comprehension of visual content and reading the text of images to generate a natural language description. Although a task can teach machines to understand the complex human environment further given that text is omnipresent in our daily surroundings, it poses additional challenges in normal captioning. A text-based image intuitively contains abundant and complex multimodal relational content, that is, image details can be described diversely from multiview rather than a single caption. Certainly, we can introduce additional paired training data to show the diversity of images' descriptions, this process is labor-intensive and time-consuming for TextCap pair annotations with extra texts. Based on the insight mentioned above, we investigate how to generate diverse captions that focus on different image parts using an unpaired training paradigm. We propose the Multimodal relAtional Graph adversarIal inferenCe (MAGIC) framework for diverse and unpaired TextCap. This framework can adaptively construct multiple multimodal relational graphs of images and model complex relationships among graphs to represent descriptive diversity. Moreover, a cascaded generative adversarial network is developed from modeled graphs to infer the unpaired caption generation in image-sentence feature alignment and linguistic coherence levels. We validate the effectiveness of MAGIC in generating diverse captions from different relational information items of an image. Experimental results show that MAGIC can generate very promising outcomes without using any image-caption training pairs.
summary: Text-based image captioning (TextCap) requires simultaneous comprehension of visual content and reading the text of images to generate a natural language description. Although a task can teach machines to understand the complex human environment further given that text is omnipresent in our daily surroundings, it poses additional challenges in normal captioning. A text-based image intuitively contains abundant and complex multimodal relational content, that is, image details can be described diversely from multiview rather than a single caption. Certainly, we can introduce additional paired training data to show the diversity of images' descriptions, this process is labor-intensive and time-consuming for TextCap pair annotations with extra texts. Based on the insight mentioned above, we investigate how to generate diverse captions that focus on different image parts using an unpaired training paradigm. We propose the Multimodal relAtional Graph adversarIal inferenCe (MAGIC) framework for diverse and unpaired TextCap. This framework can adaptively construct multiple multimodal relational graphs of images and model complex relationships among graphs to represent descriptive diversity. Moreover, a cascaded generative adversarial network is developed from modeled graphs to infer the unpaired caption generation in image-sentence feature alignment and linguistic coherence levels. We validate the effectiveness of MAGIC in generating diverse captions from different relational information items of an image. Experimental results show that MAGIC can generate very promising outcomes without using any image-caption training pairs.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的图像字幕 (TextCap) 需要同时理解视觉内容和阅读图像文本以生成自然语言描述。尽管任务可以教会机器进一步理解复杂的人类环境，因为文本在我们的日常环境中无处不在，但它对正常的字幕提出了额外的挑战。基于文本的图像直观地包含丰富且复杂的多模态关系内容，即可以从多视图而不是单个标题来描述图像细节。当然，我们可以引入额外的配对训练数据来显示图像描述的多样性，这个过程对于带有额外文本的 TextCap 配对注释来说是费力且耗时的。基于上述见解，我们研究了如何使用不成对的训练范例生成专注于不同图像部分的多样化标题。我们提出了针对多样化且不成对的 TextCap 的多模态关系图对抗推理（MAGIC）框架。该框架可以自适应地构建图像的多个多模态关系图，并对图之间的复杂关系进行建模以表示描述多样性。此外，从建模图开发了级联生成对抗网络，以推断图像句子特征对齐和语言连贯性水平中不成对的标题生成。我们验证了 MAGIC 从图像的不同关系信息项生成不同标题的有效性。实验结果表明，MAGIC 可以在不使用任何图像标题训练对的情况下产生非常有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MAGIC的框架，用于在无需配对训练数据的情况下生成多样化的文本描述。
AI.motivation: 文本图像描述生成任务需要同时理解视觉内容和文本内容，然而现有方法依赖于配对数据，这在实际应用中既耗时又费力。
AI.method: 提出了一种多模态关系图对抗推理框架MAGIC，通过构建多个多模态关系图并建模图之间的复杂关系来表示描述的多样性，并使用级联生成对抗网络进行无配对的文本描述生成。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，MAGIC能够在不使用任何图像-文本配对训练数据的情况下生成非常有前景的多样化描述。
AI.conclusion: MAGIC框架能够在无配对训练数据的情况下生成多样化的文本描述，展示了其在文本图像描述生成任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Ramy A. Zeineldin,Mohamed E. Karar,Franziska Mathis-Ullrich,Oliver Burgert
title: Ensemble CNN Networks for GBM Tumors Segmentation using Multi-parametric MRI
title_zh: 使用多参数 MRI 进行 GBM 肿瘤分割的集成 CNN 网络
comment: Accepted in BraTS 2021 (as part of the BrainLes workshop proceedings distributed by Springer LNCS)
comments: Accepted in BraTS 2021 (as part of the BrainLes workshop proceedings distributed by Springer LNCS)
abstract: Glioblastomas are the most aggressive fast-growing primary brain cancer which originate in the glial cells of the brain. Accurate identification of the malignant brain tumor and its sub-regions is still one of the most challenging problems in medical image segmentation. The Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge (BraTS) has been a popular benchmark for automatic brain glioblastomas segmentation algorithms since its initiation. In this year, BraTS 2021 challenge provides the largest multi-parametric (mpMRI) dataset of 2,000 pre-operative patients. In this paper, we propose a new aggregation of two deep learning frameworks namely, DeepSeg and nnU-Net for automatic glioblastoma recognition in pre-operative mpMRI. Our ensemble method obtains Dice similarity scores of 92.00, 87.33, and 84.10 and Hausdorff Distances of 3.81, 8.91, and 16.02 for the enhancing tumor, tumor core, and whole tumor regions, respectively, on the BraTS 2021 validation set, ranking us among the top ten teams. These experimental findings provide evidence that it can be readily applied clinically and thereby aiding in the brain cancer prognosis, therapy planning, and therapy response monitoring. A docker image for reproducing our segmentation results is available online at (https://hub.docker.com/r/razeineldin/deepseg21).
summary: Glioblastomas are the most aggressive fast-growing primary brain cancer which originate in the glial cells of the brain. Accurate identification of the malignant brain tumor and its sub-regions is still one of the most challenging problems in medical image segmentation. The Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge (BraTS) has been a popular benchmark for automatic brain glioblastomas segmentation algorithms since its initiation. In this year, BraTS 2021 challenge provides the largest multi-parametric (mpMRI) dataset of 2,000 pre-operative patients. In this paper, we propose a new aggregation of two deep learning frameworks namely, DeepSeg and nnU-Net for automatic glioblastoma recognition in pre-operative mpMRI. Our ensemble method obtains Dice similarity scores of 92.00, 87.33, and 84.10 and Hausdorff Distances of 3.81, 8.91, and 16.02 for the enhancing tumor, tumor core, and whole tumor regions, respectively, on the BraTS 2021 validation set, ranking us among the top ten teams. These experimental findings provide evidence that it can be readily applied clinically and thereby aiding in the brain cancer prognosis, therapy planning, and therapy response monitoring. A docker image for reproducing our segmentation results is available online at (https://hub.docker.com/r/razeineldin/deepseg21).
abstract_zh: 胶质母细胞瘤是最具侵袭性、快速生长的原发性脑癌，起源于大脑的神经胶质细胞。恶性脑肿瘤及其子区域的准确识别仍然是医学图像分割中最具挑战性的问题之一。脑肿瘤分割挑战赛 (BraTS) 自发起以来一直是自动脑胶质母细胞瘤分割算法的流行基准。今年，BraTS 2021 挑战赛提供了包含 2,000 名术前患者的最大多参数 (mpMRI) 数据集。在本文中，我们提出了两个深度学习框架（即 DeepSeg 和 nnU-Net）的新聚合，用于术前 mpMRI 中的自动胶质母细胞瘤识别。我们的集成方法在 BraTS 2021 验证集上，增强肿瘤、肿瘤核心和整个肿瘤区域的 Dice 相似度得分分别为 92.00、87.33 和 84.10，Hausdorff 距离分别为 3.81、8.91 和 16.02，使我们跻身前十团队之列。这些实验结果证明它可以很容易地应用于临床，从而有助于脑癌的预后、治疗计划和治疗反应监测。用于重现分割结果的 docker 镜像可在线获取 (https://hub.docker.com/r/razeineldin/deepseg21)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合DeepSeg和nnU-Net的集成卷积神经网络方法，用于多参数MRI下的胶质母细胞瘤分割。
AI.motivation: 胶质母细胞瘤的精准分割对临床诊断和治疗至关重要，而现有方法在复杂肿瘤区域的分割效果仍有不足。
AI.method: 通过集成DeepSeg和nnU-Net两种深度学习框架，利用多参数MRI数据进行肿瘤增强区、肿瘤核心区和全肿瘤区的分割。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2021验证集上，Dice相似度分别达到92.00/87.33/84.10，Hausdorff距离为3.81/8.91/16.02，排名前十。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了集成模型在临床肿瘤分割中的有效性，可辅助癌症预后评估和治疗监测。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合DeepSeg和nnU-Net的集成卷积神经网络方法，用于多参数MRI下的胶质母细胞瘤分割。

ai_content.method: 通过集成DeepSeg和nnU-Net两种深度学习框架，利用多参数MRI数据进行肿瘤增强区、肿瘤核心区和全肿瘤区的分割。
ai_content.result: 在BraTS 2021验证集上，Dice相似度分别达到92.00/87.33/84.10，Hausdorff距离为3.81/8.91/16.02，排名前十。

search_text: Ensemble CNN Networks for GBM Tumors Segmentation using Multi-parametric MRI 使用多参数 MRI 进行 GBM 肿瘤分割的集成 CNN 网络 Glioblastomas are the most aggressive fast-growing primary brain cancer which originate in the glial cells of the brain. Accurate identification of the malignant brain tumor and its sub-regions is still one of the most challenging problems in medical image segmentation. The Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge (BraTS) has been a popular benchmark for automatic brain glioblastomas segmentation algorithms since its initiation. In this year, BraTS 2021 challenge provides the largest multi-parametric (mpMRI) dataset of 2,000 pre-operative patients. In this paper, we propose a new aggregation of two deep learning frameworks namely, DeepSeg and nnU-Net for automatic glioblastoma recognition in pre-operative mpMRI. Our ensemble method obtains Dice similarity scores of 92.00, 87.33, and 84.10 and Hausdorff Distances of 3.81, 8.91, and 16.02 for the enhancing tumor, tumor core, and whole tumor regions, respectively, on the BraTS 2021 validation set, ranking us among the top ten teams. These experimental findings provide evidence that it can be readily applied clinically and thereby aiding in the brain cancer prognosis, therapy planning, and therapy response monitoring. A docker image for reproducing our segmentation results is available online at (https://hub.docker.com/r/razeineldin/deepseg21). 胶质母细胞瘤是最具侵袭性、快速生长的原发性脑癌，起源于大脑的神经胶质细胞。恶性脑肿瘤及其子区域的准确识别仍然是医学图像分割中最具挑战性的问题之一。脑肿瘤分割挑战赛 (BraTS) 自发起以来一直是自动脑胶质母细胞瘤分割算法的流行基准。今年，BraTS 2021 挑战赛提供了包含 2,000 名术前患者的最大多参数 (mpMRI) 数据集。在本文中，我们提出了两个深度学习框架（即 DeepSeg 和 nnU-Net）的新聚合，用于术前 mpMRI 中的自动胶质母细胞瘤识别。我们的集成方法在 BraTS 2021 验证集上，增强肿瘤、肿瘤核心和整个肿瘤区域的 Dice 相似度得分分别为 92.00、87.33 和 84.10，Hausdorff 距离分别为 3.81、8.91 和 16.02，使我们跻身前十团队之列。这些实验结果证明它可以很容易地应用于临床，从而有助于脑癌的预后、治疗计划和治疗反应监测。用于重现分割结果的 docker 镜像可在线获取 (https://hub.docker.com/r/razeineldin/deepseg21)。 本文提出了一种结合DeepSeg和nnU-Net的集成卷积神经网络方法，用于多参数MRI下的胶质母细胞瘤分割。 Ramy A. Zeineldin,Mohamed E. Karar,Franziska Mathis-Ullrich,Oliver Burgert cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Kamil Żywanowski,Adam Banaszczyk,Michał R. Nowicki,Jacek Komorowski
title: MinkLoc3D-SI: 3D LiDAR place recognition with sparse convolutions, spherical coordinates, and intensity
title_zh: MinkLoc3D-SI：具有稀疏卷积、球面坐标和强度的 3D LiDAR 位置识别
abstract: The 3D LiDAR place recognition aims to estimate a coarse localization in a previously seen environment based on a single scan from a rotating 3D LiDAR sensor. The existing solutions to this problem include hand-crafted point cloud descriptors (e.g., ScanContext, M2DP, LiDAR IRIS) and deep learning-based solutions (e.g., PointNetVLAD, PCAN, LPDNet, DAGC, MinkLoc3D), which are often only evaluated on accumulated 2D scans from the Oxford RobotCar dataset. We introduce MinkLoc3D-SI, a sparse convolution-based solution that utilizes spherical coordinates of 3D points and processes the intensity of 3D LiDAR measurements, improving the performance when a single 3D LiDAR scan is used. Our method integrates the improvements typical for hand-crafted descriptors (like ScanContext) with the most efficient 3D sparse convolutions (MinkLoc3D). Our experiments show improved results on single scans from 3D LiDARs (USyd Campus dataset) and great generalization ability (KITTI dataset). Using intensity information on accumulated 2D scans (RobotCar Intensity dataset) improves the performance, even though spherical representation doesn't produce a noticeable improvement. As a result, MinkLoc3D-SI is suited for single scans obtained from a 3D LiDAR, making it applicable in autonomous vehicles.
summary: The 3D LiDAR place recognition aims to estimate a coarse localization in a previously seen environment based on a single scan from a rotating 3D LiDAR sensor. The existing solutions to this problem include hand-crafted point cloud descriptors (e.g., ScanContext, M2DP, LiDAR IRIS) and deep learning-based solutions (e.g., PointNetVLAD, PCAN, LPDNet, DAGC, MinkLoc3D), which are often only evaluated on accumulated 2D scans from the Oxford RobotCar dataset. We introduce MinkLoc3D-SI, a sparse convolution-based solution that utilizes spherical coordinates of 3D points and processes the intensity of 3D LiDAR measurements, improving the performance when a single 3D LiDAR scan is used. Our method integrates the improvements typical for hand-crafted descriptors (like ScanContext) with the most efficient 3D sparse convolutions (MinkLoc3D). Our experiments show improved results on single scans from 3D LiDARs (USyd Campus dataset) and great generalization ability (KITTI dataset). Using intensity information on accumulated 2D scans (RobotCar Intensity dataset) improves the performance, even though spherical representation doesn't produce a noticeable improvement. As a result, MinkLoc3D-SI is suited for single scans obtained from a 3D LiDAR, making it applicable in autonomous vehicles.
abstract_zh: 3D LiDAR 位置识别旨在基于旋转 3D LiDAR 传感器的单次扫描来估计先前所见环境中的粗略定位。该问题的现有解决方案包括手工制作的点云描述符（例如 ScanContext、M2DP、LiDAR IRIS）和基于深度学习的解决方案（例如 PointNetVLAD、P​​CAN、LPDNet、DAGC、MinkLoc3D），这些解决方案通常仅根据 Oxford RobotCar 数据集累积的 2D 扫描进行评估。我们推出了 MinkLoc3D-SI，这是一种基于稀疏卷积的解决方案，它利用 3D 点的球面坐标并处理 3D LiDAR 测量的强度，从而提高使用单次 3D LiDAR 扫描时的性能。我们的方法将手工制作的描述符（如 ScanContext）的典型改进与最有效的 3D 稀疏卷积（MinkLoc3D）相结合。我们的实验表明 3D LiDAR（USyd Campus 数据集）的单次扫描结果得到了改进，并且具有出色的泛化能力（KITTI 数据集）。使用累积的 2D 扫描（RobotCar 强度数据集）上的强度信息可以提高性能，尽管球形表示不会产生明显的改进。因此，MinkLoc3D-SI 适用于从 3D LiDAR 获得的单次扫描，使其适用于自动驾驶汽车。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MinkLoc3D-SI方法，利用稀疏卷积、球面坐标和强度信息提升3D LiDAR场景识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D LiDAR场景识别方法多依赖2D扫描数据，难以有效处理单次3D扫描且未充分利用强度信息。
AI.method: 结合稀疏卷积与球面坐标表示，融合3D点云强度信息，整合手工特征方法优势与高效稀疏卷积架构。
AI.result: 在USyd Campus数据集单次扫描测试中性能提升，在KITTI数据集展现良好泛化能力，强度信息对2D扫描也有提升作用。
AI.conclusion: MinkLoc3D-SI适用于自动驾驶场景中的单次3D LiDAR扫描定位需求。

authors_text: Tianyuan Yu,Sen He,Yi-Zhe Song,Tao Xiang
title: Hybrid Graph Neural Networks for Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于少样本学习的混合图神经网络
comment: To appear in AAAI 2022
comments: To appear in AAAI 2022
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been used to tackle the few-shot learning (FSL) problem and shown great potentials under the transductive setting. However under the inductive setting, existing GNN based methods are less competitive. This is because they use an instance GNN as a label propagation/classification module, which is jointly meta-learned with a feature embedding network. This design is problematic because the classifier needs to adapt quickly to new tasks while the embedding does not. To overcome this problem, in this paper we propose a novel hybrid GNN (HGNN) model consisting of two GNNs, an instance GNN and a prototype GNN. Instead of label propagation, they act as feature embedding adaptation modules for quick adaptation of the meta-learned feature embedding to new tasks. Importantly they are designed to deal with a fundamental yet often neglected challenge in FSL, that is, with only a handful of shots per class, any few-shot classifier would be sensitive to badly sampled shots which are either outliers or can cause inter-class distribution overlapping. %Our two GNNs are designed to address these two types of poorly sampled few-shots respectively and their complementarity is exploited in the hybrid GNN model. Extensive experiments show that our HGNN obtains new state-of-the-art on three FSL benchmarks.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been used to tackle the few-shot learning (FSL) problem and shown great potentials under the transductive setting. However under the inductive setting, existing GNN based methods are less competitive. This is because they use an instance GNN as a label propagation/classification module, which is jointly meta-learned with a feature embedding network. This design is problematic because the classifier needs to adapt quickly to new tasks while the embedding does not. To overcome this problem, in this paper we propose a novel hybrid GNN (HGNN) model consisting of two GNNs, an instance GNN and a prototype GNN. Instead of label propagation, they act as feature embedding adaptation modules for quick adaptation of the meta-learned feature embedding to new tasks. Importantly they are designed to deal with a fundamental yet often neglected challenge in FSL, that is, with only a handful of shots per class, any few-shot classifier would be sensitive to badly sampled shots which are either outliers or can cause inter-class distribution overlapping. %Our two GNNs are designed to address these two types of poorly sampled few-shots respectively and their complementarity is exploited in the hybrid GNN model. Extensive experiments show that our HGNN obtains new state-of-the-art on three FSL benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已被用来解决小样本学习（FSL）问题，并在转导设置下显示出巨大的潜力。然而，在归纳环境下，现有的基于 GNN 的方法竞争力较差。这是因为他们使用实例 GNN 作为标签传播/分类模块，该模块与特征嵌入网络联合进行元学习。这种设计是有问题的，因为分类器需要快速适应新任务，而嵌入则不需要。为了克服这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合 GNN（HGNN）模型，由两个 GNN（一个实例 GNN 和一个原型 GNN）组成。它们不是标签传播，而是充当特征嵌入适应模块，用于将元学习的特征嵌入快速适应新任务。重要的是，它们的设计目的是应对 FSL 中一个基本但经常被忽视的挑战，即每个类只有少数镜头，任何少数镜头分类器都会对不良采样的镜头敏感，这些镜头要么是异常值，要么可能导致类间分布重叠。我们的两个 GNN 旨在分别解决这两类采样不良的少数样本，并且在混合 GNN 模型中利用了它们的互补性。大量实验表明，我们的 HGNN 在三个 FSL 基准上获得了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合图神经网络（HGNN）以解决少样本学习中的归纳设置问题，通过改进特征嵌入适应模块提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的少样本学习方法在归纳设置下效果不佳，因其将实例GNN与特征嵌入网络联合元学习，导致分类器无法快速适应新任务。
AI.method: 设计包含实例GNN和原型GNN的混合模型，分别处理异常样本和类别分布重叠问题，利用两者互补性提升特征嵌入的适应能力。
AI.result: 在三个少样本学习基准数据集上达到新的最先进水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: HGNN通过分离特征适应与分类模块，有效解决了少样本学习中样本稀缺导致的敏感性问题，验证了方法的有效性。

Instead of label propagation, they act as feature embedding adaptation modules for quick adaptation of the meta-learned feature embedding to new tasks. Importantly they are designed to deal with a fundamental yet often neglected challenge in FSL, that is, with only a handful of shots per class, any few-shot classifier would be sensitive to badly sampled shots which are either outliers or can cause inter-class distribution overlapping. %Our two GNNs are designed to address these two types of poorly sampled few-shots respectively and their complementarity is exploited in the hybrid GNN model. Extensive experiments show that our HGNN obtains new state-of-the-art on three FSL benchmarks. 图神经网络（GNN）已被用来解决小样本学习（FSL）问题，并在转导设置下显示出巨大的潜力。然而，在归纳环境下，现有的基于 GNN 的方法竞争力较差。这是因为他们使用实例 GNN 作为标签传播/分类模块，该模块与特征嵌入网络联合进行元学习。这种设计是有问题的，因为分类器需要快速适应新任务，而嵌入则不需要。为了克服这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合 GNN（HGNN）模型，由两个 GNN（一个实例 GNN 和一个原型 GNN）组成。它们不是标签传播，而是充当特征嵌入适应模块，用于将元学习的特征嵌入快速适应新任务。重要的是，它们的设计目的是应对 FSL 中一个基本但经常被忽视的挑战，即每个类只有少数镜头，任何少数镜头分类器都会对不良采样的镜头敏感，这些镜头要么是异常值，要么可能导致类间分布重叠。我们的两个 GNN 旨在分别解决这两类采样不良的少数样本，并且在混合 GNN 模型中利用了它们的互补性。大量实验表明，我们的 HGNN 在三个 FSL 基准上获得了新的最先进水平。 本文提出一种混合图神经网络（HGNN）以解决少样本学习中的归纳设置问题，通过改进特征嵌入适应模块提升模型性能。 Tianyuan Yu,Sen He,Yi-Zhe Song,Tao Xiang cs.CV

authors_text: Youngho Yoon,Inchul Chung,Lin Wang,Kuk-Jin Yoon
title: SphereSR: 360° Image Super-Resolution with Arbitrary Projection via Continuous Spherical Image Representation
title_zh: SphereSR：通过连续球面图像表示实现任意投影的 360° 图像超分辨率
abstract: The 360°imaging has recently gained great attention; however, its angular resolution is relatively lower than that of a narrow field-of-view (FOV) perspective image as it is captured by using fisheye lenses with the same sensor size. Therefore, it is beneficial to super-resolve a 360°image. Some attempts have been made but mostly considered the equirectangular projection (ERP) as one of the way for 360°image representation despite of latitude-dependent distortions. In that case, as the output high-resolution(HR) image is always in the same ERP format as the low-resolution (LR) input, another information loss may occur when transforming the HR image to other projection types. In this paper, we propose SphereSR, a novel framework to generate a continuous spherical image representation from an LR 360°image, aiming at predicting the RGB values at given spherical coordinates for super-resolution with an arbitrary 360°image projection. Specifically, we first propose a feature extraction module that represents the spherical data based on icosahedron and efficiently extracts features on the spherical surface. We then propose a spherical local implicit image function (SLIIF) to predict RGB values at the spherical coordinates. As such, SphereSR flexibly reconstructs an HR image under an arbitrary projection type. Experiments on various benchmark datasets show that our method significantly surpasses existing methods.
summary: The 360°imaging has recently gained great attention; however, its angular resolution is relatively lower than that of a narrow field-of-view (FOV) perspective image as it is captured by using fisheye lenses with the same sensor size. Therefore, it is beneficial to super-resolve a 360°image. Some attempts have been made but mostly considered the equirectangular projection (ERP) as one of the way for 360°image representation despite of latitude-dependent distortions. In that case, as the output high-resolution(HR) image is always in the same ERP format as the low-resolution (LR) input, another information loss may occur when transforming the HR image to other projection types. In this paper, we propose SphereSR, a novel framework to generate a continuous spherical image representation from an LR 360°image, aiming at predicting the RGB values at given spherical coordinates for super-resolution with an arbitrary 360°image projection. Specifically, we first propose a feature extraction module that represents the spherical data based on icosahedron and efficiently extracts features on the spherical surface. We then propose a spherical local implicit image function (SLIIF) to predict RGB values at the spherical coordinates. As such, SphereSR flexibly reconstructs an HR image under an arbitrary projection type. Experiments on various benchmark datasets show that our method significantly surpasses existing methods.
abstract_zh: 360°成像最近受到极大关注；然而，由于它是使用具有相同传感器尺寸的鱼眼镜头捕获的，因此其角分辨率相对低于窄视场（FOV）透视图像。因此，超分辨率360°图像是有益的。人们已经进行了一些尝试，但大多数人认为等距柱状投影 (ERP) 是 360° 图像表示的方法之一，尽管存在与纬度相关的扭曲。在这种情况下，由于输出的高分辨率 (HR) 图像始终采用与低分辨率 (LR) 输入相同的 ERP 格式，因此在将 HR 图像转换为其他投影类型时可能会发生另一种信息丢失。在本文中，我们提出了 SphereSR，这是一种从 LR 360° 图像生成连续球面图像表示的新颖框架，旨在预测给定球面坐标处的 RGB 值，以实现任意 360° 图像投影的超分辨率。具体来说，我们首先提出了一个特征提取模块，该模块基于二十面体表示球形数据，并有效地提取球面上的特征。然后，我们提出球面局部隐式图像函数 (SLIIF) 来预测球面坐标处的 RGB 值。因此，SphereSR可以在任意投影类型下灵活地重建HR图像。对各种基准数据集的实验表明，我们的方法显着优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SphereSR框架，通过连续球面图像表示实现360°图像的任意投影超分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 现有360°图像超分辨率方法依赖等距投影（ERP）导致纬度相关失真，且无法灵活适配其他投影类型，存在信息损失问题。
AI.method: 设计基于二十面体的特征提取模块和球面局部隐式图像函数（SLIIF），直接预测球面坐标系下的RGB值，实现任意投影类型的高分辨率重建。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了任意投影下超分辨率的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SphereSR通过连续球面表示突破ERP投影限制，为360°图像超分辨率提供了灵活且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Junjun Hu,Yanhao Zhu,Bo Zhao,Jiexin Zheng,Chenxu Zhao,Xiangyu Zhu,Kangle Wu,Darun Tang
title: Makeup216: Logo Recognition with Adversarial Attention Representations
title_zh: Makeup216：具有对抗性注意力表示的徽标识别
abstract: One of the challenges of logo recognition lies in the diversity of forms, such as symbols, texts or a combination of both; further, logos tend to be extremely concise in design while similar in appearance, suggesting the difficulty of learning discriminative representations. To investigate the variety and representation of logo, we introduced Makeup216, the largest and most complex logo dataset in the field of makeup, captured from the real world. It comprises of 216 logos and 157 brands, including 10,019 images and 37,018 annotated logo objects. In addition, we found that the marginal background around the pure logo can provide a important context information and proposed an adversarial attention representation framework (AAR) to attend on the logo subject and auxiliary marginal background separately, which can be combined for better representation. Our proposed framework achieved competitive results on Makeup216 and another large-scale open logo dataset, which could provide fresh thinking for logo recognition. The dataset of Makeup216 and the code of the proposed framework will be released soon.
summary: One of the challenges of logo recognition lies in the diversity of forms, such as symbols, texts or a combination of both; further, logos tend to be extremely concise in design while similar in appearance, suggesting the difficulty of learning discriminative representations. To investigate the variety and representation of logo, we introduced Makeup216, the largest and most complex logo dataset in the field of makeup, captured from the real world. It comprises of 216 logos and 157 brands, including 10,019 images and 37,018 annotated logo objects. In addition, we found that the marginal background around the pure logo can provide a important context information and proposed an adversarial attention representation framework (AAR) to attend on the logo subject and auxiliary marginal background separately, which can be combined for better representation. Our proposed framework achieved competitive results on Makeup216 and another large-scale open logo dataset, which could provide fresh thinking for logo recognition. The dataset of Makeup216 and the code of the proposed framework will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 标志识别的挑战之一在于形式的多样性，例如符号、文本或两者的组合；此外，徽标在设计上往往极其简洁，而外观相似，这表明学习区分性表示的困难。为了研究标志的多样性和表现形式，我们引入了 Makeup216，这是化妆领域最大、最复杂的标志数据集，从现实世界中捕获。它由 216 个徽标和 157 个品牌组成，其中包括 10,019 个图像和 37,018 个带注释的徽标对象。此外，我们发现纯徽标周围的边缘背景可以提供重要的上下文信息，并提出了一种对抗性注意表示框架（AAR）来分别关注徽标主题和辅助边缘背景，可以将它们组合起来以获得更好的表示。我们提出的框架在Makeup216和另一个大型开放标志数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果，这可以为标志识别提供新的思路。 Makeup216的数据集和所提出的框架的代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Makeup216数据集及对抗注意力表示框架（AAR），用于提升复杂场景下的商标识别性能。
AI.motivation: 商标识别面临形式多样、外观相似等挑战，现有方法难以有效利用背景信息，需构建更复杂的数据集与创新表示方法。
AI.method: 构建包含216个商标的Makeup216数据集，设计AAR框架通过分离关注商标主体与边缘背景区域，结合对抗学习增强表征能力。
AI.result: AAR框架在Makeup216及其它公开数据集上取得竞争力结果，数据集与代码即将开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入大规模真实场景数据集与对抗注意力机制，为商标识别提供了新思路与实用工具。

authors_text: N. Lakmal Deshapriya,Dan Tran,Sriram Reddy,Kavinda Gunasekara
title: Centroid-UNet: Detecting Centroids in Aerial Images
title_zh: Centroid-UNet：检测航空图像中的质心
comment: Proccedings of the 42nd Asian Conference on Remote Sensing, 2021, Can Tho city, Vietnam
comments: Proccedings of the 42nd Asian Conference on Remote Sensing, 2021, Can Tho city, Vietnam
abstract: In many applications of aerial/satellite image analysis (remote sensing), the generation of exact shapes of objects is a cumbersome task. In most remote sensing applications such as counting objects requires only location estimation of objects. Hence, locating object centroids in aerial/satellite images is an easy solution for tasks where the object's exact shape is not necessary. Thus, this study focuses on assessing the feasibility of using deep neural networks for locating object centroids in satellite images. Name of our model is Centroid-UNet. The Centroid-UNet model is based on classic U-Net semantic segmentation architecture. We modified and adapted the U-Net semantic segmentation architecture into a centroid detection model preserving the simplicity of the original model. Furthermore, we have tested and evaluated our model with two case studies involving aerial/satellite images. Those two case studies are building centroid detection case study and coconut tree centroid detection case study. Our evaluation results have reached comparably good accuracy compared to other methods, and also offer simplicity. The code and models developed under this study are also available in the Centroid-UNet GitHub repository: https://github.com/gicait/centroid-unet

In most remote sensing applications such as counting objects requires only location estimation of objects. Furthermore, we have tested and evaluated our model with two case studies involving aerial/satellite images. Those two case studies are building centroid detection case study and coconut tree centroid detection case study. Our evaluation results have reached comparably good accuracy compared to other methods, and also offer simplicity. The code and models developed under this study are also available in the Centroid-UNet GitHub repository: https://github.com/gicait/centroid-unet
abstract_zh: 在航空/卫星图像分析（遥感）的许多应用中，生成物体的精确形状是一项繁琐的任务。在大多数遥感应用中，例如对物体进行计数，仅需要物体的位置估计。因此，对于不需要物体精确形状的任务来说，在航空/卫星图像中定位物体质心是一个简单的解决方案。因此，本研究的重点是评估使用深度神经网络定位卫星图像中对象质心的可行性。我们模型的名称是 Centroid-UNet。 Centroid-UNet 模型基于经典的 U-Net 语义分割架构。我们将 U-Net 语义分割架构修改并调整为质心检测模型，保留了原始模型的简单性。此外，我们还通过两个涉及航空/卫星图像的案例研究来测试和评估我们的模型。这两个案例研究是构建质心检测案例研究和椰子树质心检测案例研究。与其他方法相比，我们的评估结果达到了相当好的准确性，并且也很简单。本研究开发的代码和模型也可以在 Centroid-UNet GitHub 存储库中找到：https://github.com/gicait/centroid-unet

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于U-Net架构的Centroid-UNet模型，用于在航拍图像中检测物体的中心点。
AI.motivation: 在遥感应用中，生成物体精确形状耗时费力，而许多任务只需物体位置信息，因此需要一种简单高效的中心点检测方法。
AI.method: 基于经典U-Net语义分割架构，修改其结构以适应中心点检测任务，保留模型简洁性并优化检测精度。
AI.result: 在建筑物和椰子树两个案例中，模型检测准确率与现有方法相当，且保持了较高的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: Centroid-UNet为遥感图像中的中心点检测提供了简单有效的解决方案，代码已开源供研究使用。

search_text: Centroid-UNet: Detecting Centroids in Aerial Images Centroid-UNet：检测航空图像中的质心 In many applications of aerial/satellite image analysis (remote sensing), the generation of exact shapes of objects is a cumbersome task. In most remote sensing applications such as counting objects requires only location estimation of objects. Hence, locating object centroids in aerial/satellite images is an easy solution for tasks where the object's exact shape is not necessary. Thus, this study focuses on assessing the feasibility of using deep neural networks for locating object centroids in satellite images. Name of our model is Centroid-UNet. The Centroid-UNet model is based on classic U-Net semantic segmentation architecture. We modified and adapted the U-Net semantic segmentation architecture into a centroid detection model preserving the simplicity of the original model. Furthermore, we have tested and evaluated our model with two case studies involving aerial/satellite images. Those two case studies are building centroid detection case study and coconut tree centroid detection case study. Our evaluation results have reached comparably good accuracy compared to other methods, and also offer simplicity. The code and models developed under this study are also available in the Centroid-UNet GitHub repository: https://github.com/gicait/centroid-unet 在航空/卫星图像分析（遥感）的许多应用中，生成物体的精确形状是一项繁琐的任务。在大多数遥感应用中，例如对物体进行计数，仅需要物体的位置估计。因此，对于不需要物体精确形状的任务来说，在航空/卫星图像中定位物体质心是一个简单的解决方案。因此，本研究的重点是评估使用深度神经网络定位卫星图像中对象质心的可行性。我们模型的名称是 Centroid-UNet。 Centroid-UNet 模型基于经典的 U-Net 语义分割架构。我们将 U-Net 语义分割架构修改并调整为质心检测模型，保留了原始模型的简单性。此外，我们还通过两个涉及航空/卫星图像的案例研究来测试和评估我们的模型。这两个案例研究是构建质心检测案例研究和椰子树质心检测案例研究。与其他方法相比，我们的评估结果达到了相当好的准确性，并且也很简单。本研究开发的代码和模型也可以在 Centroid-UNet GitHub 存储库中找到：https://github.com/gicait/centroid-unet 本文提出一种基于U-Net架构的Centroid-UNet模型，用于在航拍图像中检测物体的中心点。 N. authors_text: Richa Singh,Puspita Majumdar,Surbhi Mittal,Mayank Vatsa
title: Anatomizing Bias in Facial Analysis
title_zh: 面部分析中的解剖偏差
comment: Accepted in AAAI 2022
comments: Accepted in AAAI 2022
abstract: Existing facial analysis systems have been shown to yield biased results against certain demographic subgroups. Due to its impact on society, it has become imperative to ensure that these systems do not discriminate based on gender, identity, or skin tone of individuals. This has led to research in the identification and mitigation of bias in AI systems. In this paper, we encapsulate bias detection/estimation and mitigation algorithms for facial analysis. Our main contributions include a systematic review of algorithms proposed for understanding bias, along with a taxonomy and extensive overview of existing bias mitigation algorithms. We also discuss open challenges in the field of biased facial analysis.
summary: Existing facial analysis systems have been shown to yield biased results against certain demographic subgroups. Due to its impact on society, it has become imperative to ensure that these systems do not discriminate based on gender, identity, or skin tone of individuals. This has led to research in the identification and mitigation of bias in AI systems. In this paper, we encapsulate bias detection/estimation and mitigation algorithms for facial analysis. Our main contributions include a systematic review of algorithms proposed for understanding bias, along with a taxonomy and extensive overview of existing bias mitigation algorithms. We also discuss open challenges in the field of biased facial analysis.
abstract_zh: 现有的面部分析系统已被证明会针对某些人口亚群产生有偏差的结果。由于其对社会的影响，必须确保这些系统不会基于个人的性别、身份或肤色进行歧视。这引发了人工智能系统中识别和减轻偏见的研究。在本文中，我们封装了用于面部分析的偏差检测/估计和缓解算法。我们的主要贡献包括对为理解偏差而提出的算法进行系统回顾，以及对现有偏差缓解算法的分类和广泛概述。我们还讨论了有偏见的面部分析领域的开放挑战。

AI.tldr: 系统回顾和分类面部分析中的偏差检测与缓解算法
AI.motivation: 现有面部分析系统存在对特定群体的偏见，需确保系统不歧视，因此需研究偏差识别与缓解方法
AI.method: 通过系统回顾、分类法构建及综述现有缓解算法，并讨论开放挑战
AI.result: 提供了偏差检测与缓解算法的系统综述、分类法及缓解算法概述，并指出了开放挑战
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究以解决面部分析中的偏差问题，确保系统公平性

authors_text: Antonio Carta,Andrea Cossu,Vincenzo Lomonaco,Davide Bacciu
title: Ex-Model: Continual Learning from a Stream of Trained Models
title_zh: 前模型：从一系列经过训练的模型中持续学习
abstract: Learning continually from non-stationary data streams is a challenging research topic of growing popularity in the last few years. Being able to learn, adapt, and generalize continually in an efficient, effective, and scalable way is fundamental for a sustainable development of Artificial Intelligent systems. However, an agent-centric view of continual learning requires learning directly from raw data, which limits the interaction between independent agents, the efficiency, and the privacy of current approaches. Instead, we argue that continual learning systems should exploit the availability of compressed information in the form of trained models. In this paper, we introduce and formalize a new paradigm named "Ex-Model Continual Learning" (ExML), where an agent learns from a sequence of previously trained models instead of raw data. We further contribute with three ex-model continual learning algorithms and an empirical setting comprising three datasets (MNIST, CIFAR-10 and CORe50), and eight scenarios, where the proposed algorithms are extensively tested. Finally, we highlight the peculiarities of the ex-model paradigm and we point out interesting future research directions.
summary: Learning continually from non-stationary data streams is a challenging research topic of growing popularity in the last few years. Being able to learn, adapt, and generalize continually in an efficient, effective, and scalable way is fundamental for a sustainable development of Artificial Intelligent systems. However, an agent-centric view of continual learning requires learning directly from raw data, which limits the interaction between independent agents, the efficiency, and the privacy of current approaches. Instead, we argue that continual learning systems should exploit the availability of compressed information in the form of trained models. In this paper, we introduce and formalize a new paradigm named "Ex-Model Continual Learning" (ExML), where an agent learns from a sequence of previously trained models instead of raw data. We further contribute with three ex-model continual learning algorithms and an empirical setting comprising three datasets (MNIST, CIFAR-10 and CORe50), and eight scenarios, where the proposed algorithms are extensively tested. Finally, we highlight the peculiarities of the ex-model paradigm and we point out interesting future research directions.
abstract_zh: 从非平稳数据流中持续学习是一个具有挑战性的研究主题，在过去几年中越来越受欢迎。能够以高效、有效和可扩展的方式不断学习、适应和泛化是人工智能系统可持续发展的基础。然而，以主体为中心的持续学习观点需要直接从原始数据中学习，这限制了独立主体之间的交互、当前方法的效率和隐私。相反，我们认为持续学习系统应该以训练模型的形式利用压缩信息的可用性。在本文中，我们引入并形式化了一种名为“前模型持续学习”（ExML）的新范式，其中代理从一系列先前训练的模型而不是原始数据中学习。我们进一步贡献了三种前模型持续学习算法和一个由三个数据集（MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CORe50）和八个场景组成的经验设置，其中所提出的算法经过了广泛的测试。最后，我们强调了前模型范式的特殊性，并指出了未来有趣的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Ex-Model Continual Learning (ExML)的新范式，通过从一系列已训练模型中学习，而非直接使用原始数据，解决持续学习中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统持续学习方法依赖原始数据流，存在效率低、隐私问题及多智能体交互受限等缺陷。作者认为利用已有训练模型中的压缩信息可提升学习效率与隐私保护。
AI.method: 提出ExML范式及三种对应的持续学习算法，并在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CORe50三个数据集的八种场景中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的ExML算法在多个数据集和场景中展现出良好的持续学习能力，验证了该范式的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ExML范式为持续学习提供了新思路，通过模型间知识传递提升效率，未来可进一步探索其在更复杂任务和分布式环境中的应用。

authors_text: Yuesong Tian,Li Shen,Xiang Tian,Dacheng Tao,Zhifeng Li,Wei Liu,Yaowu Chen
title: DGL-GAN: Discriminator Guided Learning for GAN Compression
title_zh: DGL-GAN：GAN 压缩的判别器引导学习
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) with high computation costs, e.g., BigGAN and StyleGAN2, have achieved remarkable results in synthesizing high-resolution images from random noise. Reducing the computation cost of GANs while keeping generating photo-realistic images is a challenging field. In this work, we propose a novel yet simple {\bf D}iscriminator {\bf G}uided {\bf L}earning approach for compressing vanilla {\bf GAN}, dubbed {\bf DGL-GAN}. Motivated by the phenomenon that the teacher discriminator may contain some meaningful information about both real images and fake images, we merely transfer the knowledge from the teacher discriminator via the adversarial interaction between the teacher discriminator and the student generator. We apply DGL-GAN to compress the two most representative large-scale vanilla GANs, i.e., StyleGAN2 and BigGAN. Experiments show that DGL-GAN achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on both StyleGAN2 and BigGAN. Moreover, DGL-GAN is also effective in boosting the performance of original uncompressed GANs. Original uncompressed StyleGAN2 boosted with DGL-GAN achieves FID 2.65 on FFHQ, which achieves a new state-of-the-art performance. Code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/yuesongtian/DGL-GAN}
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) with high computation costs, e.g., BigGAN and StyleGAN2, have achieved remarkable results in synthesizing high-resolution images from random noise. Reducing the computation cost of GANs while keeping generating photo-realistic images is a challenging field. In this work, we propose a novel yet simple {\bf D}iscriminator {\bf G}uided {\bf L}earning approach for compressing vanilla {\bf GAN}, dubbed {\bf DGL-GAN}. Motivated by the phenomenon that the teacher discriminator may contain some meaningful information about both real images and fake images, we merely transfer the knowledge from the teacher discriminator via the adversarial interaction between the teacher discriminator and the student generator. We apply DGL-GAN to compress the two most representative large-scale vanilla GANs, i.e., StyleGAN2 and BigGAN. Experiments show that DGL-GAN achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on both StyleGAN2 and BigGAN. Moreover, DGL-GAN is also effective in boosting the performance of original uncompressed GANs. Original uncompressed StyleGAN2 boosted with DGL-GAN achieves FID 2.65 on FFHQ, which achieves a new state-of-the-art performance. Code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/yuesongtian/DGL-GAN}
abstract_zh: 计算成本较高的生成对抗网络（GAN），例如 BigGAN 和 StyleGAN2，在从随机噪声合成高分辨率图像方面取得了显着的成果。在保持生成逼真图像的同时降低 GAN 的计算成本是一个具有挑战性的领域。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖而简单的{\bf D}判别器{\bf G}辅助的{\bf L}收益方法来压缩普通{\bf GAN}，称为{\bf DGL-GAN}。由于教师判别器可能包含一些关于真实图像和假图像的有意义的信息，我们只是通过教师判别器和学生生成器之间的对抗性交互从教师判别器转移知识。我们应用 DGL-GAN 来压缩两个最具代表性的大规模普通 GAN，即 StyleGAN2 和 BigGAN。实验表明，DGL-GAN 在 StyleGAN2 和 BigGAN 上均取得了最先进 (SOTA) 的结果。此外，DGL-GAN 还可以有效提升原始未压缩 GAN 的性能。使用 DGL-GAN 增强的原始未压缩 StyleGAN2 在 FFHQ 上实现了 FID 2.65，从而实现了新的最先进性能。代码和模型可在 \url{https://github.com/yuesongtian/DGL-GAN} 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DGL-GAN的判别器引导学习方法，用于压缩大規模生成對抗網絡（GAN），如StyleGAN2和BigGAN，同時保持生成高分辨率照片級真實圖像的能力。
AI.motivation: 高計算成本的GAN（如StyleGAN2和BigGAN）在生成高分辨率圖像方面表現出色，但壓縮這些模型而不影響生成質量是一個挑戰。作者發現教師判別器中包含有關真實和偽造圖像的有意義信息，因此提出通過知識遷移來實現壓縮。
AI.method: DGL-GAN通過教師判別器與學生生成器之間的對抗互動，僅轉移教師判別器的知識，從而壓縮原始GAN模型。該方法應用於StyleGAN2和BigGAN的壓縮。
AI.result: 實驗表明，DGL-GAN在StyleGAN2和BigGAN壓縮任務中均達到當時最優（SOTA）結果。此外，DGL-GAN還能提升未壓縮GAN的性能，例如增強後的StyleGAN2在FFHQ數據集上的FID值達到2.65，創下新紀錄。
AI.conclusion: DGL-GAN是一種有效壓縮GAN的創新方法，不僅實現了模型壓縮，還提升了生成圖像的質量，為高效率的GAN應用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tuan Hoang,Thanh-Toan Do,Tam V. Nguyen,Ngai-Man Cheung
title: Multi-Modal Mutual Information Maximization: A Novel Approach for Unsupervised Deep Cross-Modal Hashing
title_zh: 多模态互信息最大化：一种无监督深度跨模态哈希的新方法
abstract: In this paper, we adopt the maximizing mutual information (MI) approach to tackle the problem of unsupervised learning of binary hash codes for efficient cross-modal retrieval. We proposed a novel method, dubbed Cross-Modal Info-Max Hashing (CMIMH). First, to learn informative representations that can preserve both intra- and inter-modal similarities, we leverage the recent advances in estimating variational lower-bound of MI to maximize the MI between the binary representations and input features and between binary representations of different modalities. By jointly maximizing these MIs under the assumption that the binary representations are modelled by multivariate Bernoulli distributions, we can learn binary representations, which can preserve both intra- and inter-modal similarities, effectively in a mini-batch manner with gradient descent. Furthermore, we find out that trying to minimize the modality gap by learning similar binary representations for the same instance from different modalities could result in less informative representations. Hence, balancing between reducing the modality gap and losing modality-private information is important for the cross-modal retrieval tasks. Quantitative evaluations on standard benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms other state-of-the-art cross-modal retrieval methods.
summary: In this paper, we adopt the maximizing mutual information (MI) approach to tackle the problem of unsupervised learning of binary hash codes for efficient cross-modal retrieval. We proposed a novel method, dubbed Cross-Modal Info-Max Hashing (CMIMH). First, to learn informative representations that can preserve both intra- and inter-modal similarities, we leverage the recent advances in estimating variational lower-bound of MI to maximize the MI between the binary representations and input features and between binary representations of different modalities. By jointly maximizing these MIs under the assumption that the binary representations are modelled by multivariate Bernoulli distributions, we can learn binary representations, which can preserve both intra- and inter-modal similarities, effectively in a mini-batch manner with gradient descent. Furthermore, we find out that trying to minimize the modality gap by learning similar binary representations for the same instance from different modalities could result in less informative representations. Hence, balancing between reducing the modality gap and losing modality-private information is important for the cross-modal retrieval tasks. Quantitative evaluations on standard benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms other state-of-the-art cross-modal retrieval methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们采用最大化互信息（MI）方法来解决二进制哈希码的无监督学习问题，以实现高效的跨模式检索。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，称为跨模态信息最大散列（CMIMH）。首先，为了学习可以保留模态内和模间相似性的信息表示，我们利用估计 MI 变分下界的最新进展来最大化二进制表示和输入特征之间以及不同模态的二进制表示之间的 MI。通过在二进制表示由多元伯努利分布建模的假设下联合最大化这些 MI，我们可以学习二进制表示，它可以通过梯度下降以小批量方式有效地保留模内和模间相似性。此外，我们发现，尝试通过从不同模态学习同一实例的相似二进制表示来最小化模态差距可能会导致信息量较少的表示。因此，减少模态差距和丢失模态私有信息之间的平衡对于跨模态检索任务非常重要。对标准基准数据集的定量评估表明，所提出的方法始终优于其他最先进的跨模态检索方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督深度跨模态哈希方法，通过最大化多模态互信息来学习二进制哈希码，以提升跨模态检索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态哈希方法在缩小模态差距时易丢失模态特有信息，难以同时保持模内与模间相似性，亟需平衡两者以提升检索性能。
AI.method: 提出跨模态信息最大化哈希（CMIMH）方法，利用变分下界估计互信息，联合最大化二进制表示与输入特征、不同模态间的互信息，并通过伯努利分布建模二进制码，采用梯度下降实现小批量学习。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上的定量评估表明，CMIMH在跨模态检索任务中持续优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过平衡模态差距缩减与模态私有信息保留，CMIMH有效提升了跨模态哈希的表示能力与检索性能。

Furthermore, we find out that trying to minimize the modality gap by learning similar binary representations for the same instance from different modalities could result in less informative representations. Hence, balancing between reducing the modality gap and losing modality-private information is important for the cross-modal retrieval tasks. Quantitative evaluations on standard benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms other state-of-the-art cross-modal retrieval methods. 在本文中，我们采用最大化互信息（MI）方法来解决二进制哈希码的无监督学习问题，以实现高效的跨模式检索。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，称为跨模态信息最大散列（CMIMH）。首先，为了学习可以保留模态内和模间相似性的信息表示，我们利用估计 MI 变分下界的最新进展来最大化二进制表示和输入特征之间以及不同模态的二进制表示之间的 MI。通过在二进制表示由多元伯努利分布建模的假设下联合最大化这些 MI，我们可以学习二进制表示，它可以通过梯度下降以小批量方式有效地保留模内和模间相似性。此外，我们发现，尝试通过从不同模态学习同一实例的相似二进制表示来最小化模态差距可能会导致信息量较少的表示。因此，减少模态差距和丢失模态私有信息之间的平衡对于跨模态检索任务非常重要。对标准基准数据集的定量评估表明，所提出的方法始终优于其他最先进的跨模态检索方法。 本文提出一种无监督深度跨模态哈希方法，通过最大化多模态互信息来学习二进制哈希码，以提升跨模态检索效率。 Tuan Hoang,Thanh-Toan Do,Tam V. Nguyen,Ngai-Man Cheung cs.CV

authors_text: Andrea Behanova,Ali Abdollahzadeh,Ilya Belevich,Eija Jokitalo,Alejandra Sierra,Jussi Tohka
title: gACSON software for automated segmentation and morphology analyses of myelinated axons in 3D electron microscopy
title_zh: gACSON 软件，用于 3D 电子显微镜中有髓轴突的自动分割和形态分析
abstract: Background and Objective: Advances in electron microscopy (EM) now allow three-dimensional (3D) imaging of hundreds of micrometers of tissue with nanometer-scale resolution, providing new opportunities to study the ultrastructure of the brain. In this work, we introduce a freely available Matlab-based gACSON software for visualization, segmentation, assessment, and morphology analysis of myelinated axons in 3D-EM volumes of brain tissue samples. Methods: The software is equipped with a graphical user interface (GUI). It automatically segments the intra-axonal space of myelinated axons and their corresponding myelin sheaths and allows manual segmentation, proofreading, and interactive correction of the segmented components. gACSON analyzes the morphology of myelinated axons, such as axonal diameter, axonal eccentricity, myelin thickness, or g-ratio. Results: We illustrate the use of the software by segmenting and analyzing myelinated axons in six 3D-EM volumes of rat somatosensory cortex after sham surgery or traumatic brain injury (TBI). Our results suggest that the equivalent diameter of myelinated axons in somatosensory cortex was decreased in TBI animals five months after the injury. Conclusions: Our results indicate that gACSON is a valuable tool for visualization, segmentation, assessment, and morphology analysis of myelinated axons in 3D-EM volumes. It is freely available at https://github.com/AndreaBehan/g-ACSON under the MIT license.
summary: Background and Objective: Advances in electron microscopy (EM) now allow three-dimensional (3D) imaging of hundreds of micrometers of tissue with nanometer-scale resolution, providing new opportunities to study the ultrastructure of the brain. In this work, we introduce a freely available Matlab-based gACSON software for visualization, segmentation, assessment, and morphology analysis of myelinated axons in 3D-EM volumes of brain tissue samples. Methods: The software is equipped with a graphical user interface (GUI). Results: We illustrate the use of the software by segmenting and analyzing myelinated axons in six 3D-EM volumes of rat somatosensory cortex after sham surgery or traumatic brain injury (TBI). Our results suggest that the equivalent diameter of myelinated axons in somatosensory cortex was decreased in TBI animals five months after the injury. Conclusions: Our results indicate that gACSON is a valuable tool for visualization, segmentation, assessment, and morphology analysis of myelinated axons in 3D-EM volumes. It is freely available at https://github.com/AndreaBehan/g-ACSON under the MIT license.
abstract_zh: 背景和目的：电子显微镜 (EM) 的进步现在可以对数百微米的组织进行纳米级分辨率的三维 (3D) 成像，为研究大脑超微结构提供了新的机会。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一款免费的基于 Matlab 的 gACSON 软件，用于对脑组织样本 3D-EM 体积中的有髓轴突进行可视化、分割、评估和形态分析。方法：该软件配备了图形用户界面（GUI）。它自动分割有髓轴突及其相应髓鞘的轴突内空间，并允许对分割组件进行手动分割、校对和交互式校正。 gACSON 分析有髓轴突的形态，例如轴突直径、轴突偏心率、髓鞘厚度或 g 比。结果：我们通过在假手术或创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 后对大鼠体感皮层的六个 3D-EM 体积中的有髓轴突进行分段和分析来说明该软件的使用。我们的结果表明，TBI 动物受伤五个月后，体感皮层中有髓轴突的等效直径减小。结论：我们的结果表明，gACSON 是一种对 3D-EM 体积中有髓轴突进行可视化、分割、评估和形态分析的有价值的工具。它可以在 MIT 许可下从 https://github.com/AndreaBehan/g-ACSON 免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为gACSON的软件，用于在3D电子显微镜（EM）图像中自动分割和分析髓鞘化轴突的形态。
AI.motivation: 随着电子显微镜技术的进步，3D成像能够以纳米级分辨率观察数百微米的组织，为研究脑超微结构提供了新机会，但需要专门工具进行高效分析。
AI.method: 开发了基于Matlab的图形化软件，包含自动分割髓鞘化轴突及其髓鞘的功能，并支持手动校正和交互式修正。软件可分析轴突直径、偏心率、髓鞘厚度等形态参数。
AI.result: 在大鼠感觉皮层的六组3D-EM数据中，软件检测到创伤性脑损伤（TBI）后五个月，髓鞘化轴突的等效直径显著减小。
AI.conclusion: gACSON是分析3D-EM图像中髓鞘化轴突形态的有力工具，已开源并提供MIT许可协议。

authors_text: Boseong Felipe Jeon,Changhyeon Kim,Hojoon Shin,H. Jin Kim
title: Aerial Chasing of a Dynamic Target in Complex Environments
title_zh: 复杂环境下动态目标的空中追逐
comment: 10 pages
comments: 10 pages
abstract: Rapidly generating an optimal chasing motion of a drone to follow a dynamic target among obstacles is challenging due to numerical issues rising from multiple conflicting objectives and non-convex constraints. This study proposes to resolve the difficulties with a fast and reliable pipeline that incorporates 1) a target movement forecaster and 2) a chasing planner. They are based on a sample-and-check approach that consists of the generation of high-quality candidate primitives and the feasibility tests with a light computation load. We forecast the movement of the target by selecting an optimal prediction among a set of candidates built from past observations. Based on the prediction, we construct a set of prospective chasing trajectories which reduce the high-order derivatives, while maintaining the desired relative distance from the predicted target movement. Then, the candidate trajectories are tested on safety of the chaser and visibility toward the target without loose approximation of the constraints. The proposed algorithm is thoroughly evaluated in challenging scenarios involving dynamic obstacles. Also, the overall process from the target recognition to the chasing motion planning is implemented fully onboard on a drone, demonstrating real-world applicability.
summary: Rapidly generating an optimal chasing motion of a drone to follow a dynamic target among obstacles is challenging due to numerical issues rising from multiple conflicting objectives and non-convex constraints. This study proposes to resolve the difficulties with a fast and reliable pipeline that incorporates 1) a target movement forecaster and 2) a chasing planner. They are based on a sample-and-check approach that consists of the generation of high-quality candidate primitives and the feasibility tests with a light computation load. We forecast the movement of the target by selecting an optimal prediction among a set of candidates built from past observations. Based on the prediction, we construct a set of prospective chasing trajectories which reduce the high-order derivatives, while maintaining the desired relative distance from the predicted target movement. Then, the candidate trajectories are tested on safety of the chaser and visibility toward the target without loose approximation of the constraints. The proposed algorithm is thoroughly evaluated in challenging scenarios involving dynamic obstacles. Also, the overall process from the target recognition to the chasing motion planning is implemented fully onboard on a drone, demonstrating real-world applicability.
abstract_zh: 由于多个相互冲突的目标和非凸约束引起的数值问题，快速生成无人机的最佳追逐运动以跟踪障碍物中的动态目标具有挑战性。本研究建议通过快速可靠的管道来解决这些困难，该管道包含 1) 目标运动预测器和 2) 追踪规划器。它们基于采样和检查方法，包括生成高质量候选基元和轻计算负载的可行性测试。我们通过在根据过去的观察建立的一组候选者中选择最佳预测来预测目标的运动。基于预测，我们构建了一组预期的追逐轨迹，减少高阶导数，同时保持与预测目标运动的期望相对距离。然后，在不松散近似约束的情况下，测试候选轨迹的追踪器安全性和目标可见性。所提出的算法在涉及动态障碍物的挑战性场景中进行了彻底评估。此外，从目标识别到追逐运动规划的整个过程完全在无人机上实现，展示了现实世界的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无人机在复杂环境中快速生成最优追逐轨迹的方法，以跟踪动态目标并避开障碍物。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理动态目标跟踪时面临多目标冲突和非凸约束导致的数值问题，难以实现实时可靠追踪。
AI.method: 采用基于采样与验证的双阶段框架：1）通过历史观测构建候选集预测目标运动；2）生成高阶导数降低的候选轨迹并进行安全性和可见性验证，无需松弛约束近似。
AI.result: 算法在动态障碍场景中表现优异，且整个追踪规划流程已实现在无人机机载系统中，验证了实际应用可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过高效轨迹生成与严格约束验证，在复杂环境下实现了无人机对动态目标的可靠追踪。
